---
title: "Semana 3_Creación de un vector y hallar promedio y desviación"
author: "ESPINOZA RAMIREZ SEBASTIAN"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
# Creación de vector
datos <- c(20, 18, 10, 30, 25, 11)

# Promedio
promedio <- mean(datos)

# Desviación estándar
desviacion <- sd(datos)

# Mostrar resultados
promedio
desviacion
```
